ogTitle: Skillion Flat vs Skinners Shoot: Climate Safety

heading: Skillion Flat vs Skinners Shoot — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Skillion Flat, New South Wales and Skinners Shoot, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Skillion Flat has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Skinners Shoot (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Skillion Flat or Skinners Shoot safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Skillion Flat has a flood risk score of 28/100, while Skinners Shoot scores 58/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Skillion Flat scores 19/100 for bushfire risk. Skinners Shoot scores 27/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Skillion Flat or Skinners Shoot?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Skillion Flat has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.4% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
